findings.message: Admin tenant CRUD is intentionally open (no operator JWT). Wrap behind operator auth in production.
findings.remediation: Add JWT/OIDC admin scope check; deny if missing.

findings.message: RBAC enforced — Role enum + 10 requireRole/requirePermission guard sites across routes.
No A02 findings — HSM uses noble/ed25519, TLS enforced in nginx, no hardcoded secrets.
No injection sinks detected (eval/Function/innerHTML/exec).
Wallet operations rely on Node single-threaded execution. Add row-level lock when moving to Postgres.
Lockfile present.
Detailed CVE list owned by scripts/dependency-scan.mjs — see reports/security/DEPENDENCIES_*.json.
Per-tenant rate limit implemented.
GAAS_API_KEYS comes from env-var split on comma; no length/entropy validation. Document policy: ≥ 32 random bytes, base64.
No MFA implemented for admin/operator portals (placeholder).
package-lock.json present (deterministic installs).
Audit log uses hash-chain (sealEntry + verifyChain).
GitHub Release artifacts not signed (cosign/Sigstore). Add to release workflow.
No third-party CDN scripts in use; if added, require Subresource Integrity (integrity=).
Fastify logger enabled in main bootstrap.
AuditStore append-only with hash chain.
No centralized log shipping (ELK / CloudWatch / Datadog). Configure in deployment.
No alerting on anomalies (failed auth bursts, RTP drift). Wire Prometheus → Alertmanager.
Prometheus /api/metrics endpoint exposed.
No external URL fetch detected from request-derived input.
